privileged_info_summary: The task uses a local Aerobridge Django application running at http://localhost:8000/admin/ with credentials admin/adminpass123. Three orphaned flight plans are created synthetically via setup_task.sh: MIG-ERR-101 assigned to pilot John Skywalker (should map to operator SkyHigh Services), MIG-ERR-102 assigned to pilot Sarah Fields (should map to operator AgriDrones Inc), and MIG-ERR-103 assigned to pilot John Skywalker (should map to operator SkyHigh Services). These relationships are established by linking pilots to their respective companies in the database at task initialization. All metadata claims regarding admin URL, credentials, target flight plans, pilots, and expected operators have been verified against the task setup scripts.
